pr.title: Record: Fused MLP (Triton+CUTLASS EVT) + MLP 3.5× + Mixed int5/int6 + SLOT + Brotli — 1.1088 BPB (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Fuses Triton/CUTLASS MLP kernels, widens the MLP to 3.5×, and applies Hessian-guided mixed int5/int6 GPTQ plus Brotli compression and SLOT eval.
techniques: Fused Triton TMA forward + CUTLASS EVT backward MLP kernels
Hessian-trace mixed int5/int6 GPTQ enabling a 3.5× LeakyReLU MLP
SLOT eval with Brotli-11 artifact compression
